Game.Name: World League Basketball (Europe)
Game.plot: NCAA Basketball is a Sports game, developed by Sculptured Software and published by Hal,which was released in Japan in 1992.Cheat: 20 second halvesOn the Game Options menu following the title screen, enter the following code: right, right, left, left, right, left, right, left, right, right, right, right, left, left, right, left. If entered correctly, the music resets. Play the game in season mode and halves will be 20 seconds.Cheat: 20 second halvesOn the Game Options menu following the title screen, enter the following code: right, right, right, left, left, right, right, right, right, left, left, left, right, right, right. If entered correctly, the music will change. After setting up a game, when the Tonight's Matchup screen appears, press any button except X or A to instantly win the game. Press X to lose. Press A to play the game normally.
